subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas noticed with a quiet unease that their imp guide had vanished entirely.
source_quote: Akritas noticed with a quiet unease that their imp guide had vanished entirely

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur viewed the ancient Abyssal operating system with a craftsman's contempt.
source_quote: with a craftsman's contempt, mocked the ancient and notoriously unreliable Abyssal operating system

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur suddenly recoiled when he discovered the second tile was rigged with a magical glyph.
source_quote: when he suddenly recoiled — the second tile was rigged with a devastating magical glyph

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur deduced that the stone golem was keyed to recognize the specific scent of Vraxen.
source_quote: Felkur studied the creature carefully and deduced that it was keyed to recognize the specific scent of Vraxen himself

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur was stopped cold by the discovery of his own drunken sale of a priceless brooch in the Lexicon.
source_quote: what he found stopped him cold

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur had unknowingly become the legendary Phantom Thief due to a magical ward on the brooch he sold.
source_quote: Felkur had unknowingly become the Phantom Thief

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur found a loophole in the contract stating that if the Lexicon no longer contained his information, the contract was null and void.
source_quote: he found a loophole — if the Lexicon no longer contained the information needed to identify him, the contract was null and void

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur apparently had learned nothing from the evening's events regarding his tendency to steal.
source_quote: Felkur, apparently having learned nothing from the evening's events, also slid a large pure crystal

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur mocked the outdated Abyssal operating system with a specific phrase.
source_quote: Yo, who the hell uses the Abyssal operating system anymore, bro?

subject: Veris
fact: Veris was furious and vengeful after discovering his name was forged into the Lexicon.
source_quote: Furious and vengeful after discovering his name was forged into the Lexicon of Oaths

subject: Veris
fact: Veris declared that he would not be killed by the party.
source_quote: I will not be killed by the likes of you!

subject: Veris
fact: Veris knew that the gnome had to be hiding somewhere in the room.
source_quote: his eyes scanning the room for the gnome he knew had to be hiding somewhere

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur worked in silence and shadow while his invisible hands threaded arcane crystals through the teleportation circle's mechanisms.
source_quote: Felkur worked in silence and shadow, his invisible hands threading arcane crystals through the teleportation circle's mechanisms with painstaking care

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur needed only a few more precious minutes to finish his work on the portal.
source_quote: Felkur needed only a few more precious minutes to finish his work on the portal

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur decided against ripping a page out of the Lexicon to avoid leaving a trace of the theft.
source_quote: Felkur decides against ripping a page out of the Lexicon of Oaths to avoid leaving a trace of the theft

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur wanted to enhance his artificer abilities by stealing the Faerzess Shard.
source_quote: Felkur steals a large pure crystal known as Faerzess Shard to enhance his artificer abilities
